creator: _jkrow
caption:
What’s in Upstate NY, anyway?

If I had a dime every time someone asked me what’s so great about New York, I’d never have to work again 😅

🌲 Planning a summer road trip Upstate? I put together an interactive map with all my favorite outdoor spots, hidden gems and cozy cabins so you can plan an adventure that actually feels worth your time 

Grab it through the 🔗 in my bio, or say ‘MAP’ and I’ll send it your way

transcription.text: Don't wake me, I'm not dreamin' Past times could never hold me down Lost in space
